title: Raccoon Removal in Kew Gardens, Queens | $900 – $4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Kew Gardens, Queens. Licensed experts safely remove raccoons from attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Call for fast service: $900 – $4,000.
intro: Kew Gardens residents facing raccoon intrusions need swift, humane removal to protect their historic homes and garden landscapes. Our licensed technicians specialize in safe raccoon extraction, exclusion, and damage repair throughout this tree-lined Queens neighborhood. With raccoons increasingly seeking shelter in attics and chimneys, Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive solutions tailored to Kew Gardens properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Kew Gardens homeowners for over a decade with humane, effective raccoon removal that respects both your property and local wildlife regulations. Our team offers same-day emergency service, lifetime guarantees on exclusion work, and thorough attic restoration to ensure raccoons never return to your Kew Gardens home.
localContext: Kew Gardens' mature trees near Forest Park and the charming Tudor-style homes create ideal habitats for raccoons seeking food and shelter. The neighborhood's proximity to greenspaces and older architecture with accessible entry points makes professional wildlife exclusion especially important for protecting these valued properties.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Kew Gardens?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Kew Gardens typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any attic damage needing repair. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Kew Gardens, Queens?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Kew Gardens due to the neighborhood's proximity to Forest Park, abundant trees, and older homes with accessible attics and chimneys. They're particularly active in spring when mothers seek denning sites and in fall when they search for winter shelter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Kew Gardens home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service for Kew Gardens residents. Initial removal typically takes 1-3 days depending on the situation, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points. Mother raccoons with babies require special timing to ensure humane removal of the entire family.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by raccoons in attics?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide complete attic restoration services including insulation replacement, contaminated material removal, sanitization, and structural repairs. Raccoon damage can include torn insulation, damaged ductwork, and soiled areas that pose health risks, all of which we address as part of our comprehensive service.
